{{CargoRelic
|name=The Dream
|class_id=22807
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=The Dream features Marie-Thérèse as the model, capturing her image at the age of twenty-two and giving it new artistic life through Picasso's work. The painting combines Cubism with Neoclassicism, simplifying the female form through an almost planar approach, using simple lines and a red background to add a layer of mysterious and passionate emotional atmosphere to the painting. It showcases Picasso's unique insight into the love of spirit and flesh, creating a modern yet classical charm.
|fame=54
|art=107
|fth=67
|civ=73
|tech=61
|ss1=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +9<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 240<br>Per Dorm Decor gained, Snail RUSH +3<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 40/40
|ss2=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +18<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 320<br>Per Dorm Decor gained, Snail RUSH +4<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 40/40
|ss3=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +27<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 400<br>Per Dorm Decor gained, Snail RUSH +5<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 40/40
|ss4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +45<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 560<br>Per Dorm Decor gained, Snail RUSH +7<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 40/40
|ss5=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +63<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 720<br>Per Dorm Decor gained, Snail RUSH +9<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 40/40
|ss6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 960<br>Per Dorm Decor gained, Snail RUSH +12<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 40/40
|ss7=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 960<br>Per Dorm Decor gained, Snail RUSH +12<br>Dorm Decor Gained: 40/40<br>Per 60 Demon Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's ART +15
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail DEF +600
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Blue Card Drops +6%
}}
